assessment.note: She points to last cycle as the thing still in the way, which signals unresolved meaning from that decision and a mild growth blockage tied to unclear readout.

new_queue.label: Last cycle meaning
new_queue.name: When you say 'last cycle' — what part of it are you still carrying?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific unresolved piece from last cycle that is still shaping her growth picture.

new_queue.label: Stretch now
new_queue.name: Which part of your current work is actually stretching you right now?
new_queue.description: Distinguishes comfort-zone execution from genuine growth moments.

new_queue.label: Decision readout
new_queue.name: What did you take from last cycle's decision?
new_queue.description: Checks whether she got a concrete interpretation of the pass-over and what meaning she made of it.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Next chapter
new_queue.name: Where do you want your Principal scope to be taking you next?
new_queue.description: Gets her to name the kind of broader impact or scope she wants, beyond a generic growth answer.

new_queue.label: Strategic edge
new_queue.name: What kind of work would most strengthen your case for the next step?
new_queue.description: Forces a concrete view of which experiences would actually move her trajectory.

new_queue.label: Manager leverage
new_queue.name: What would you want more of from me to make the next stretch feel worth it?
new_queue.description: Elicits the kind of manager support that would help her re-engage and move forward.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff check
new_queue.name: What would you be willing to drop to make room for the growth work you want?
new_queue.description: Makes the cost of growth explicit and tests whether her current investments are aligned.

new_queue.label: Close the loop
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to act on before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Ends with one concrete next move and keeps the conversation anchored in commitment.
